ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot interacting with a button, represented by the emoji 🔲.  The sequence will focus on the robot's arms, simulating the action of pressing the button.  The robot's arms, lacking elbows, will use their two shoulder joints to achieve a natural-looking press. The movement will be deliberate and controlled, emphasizing the precision of the interaction. Frame 1 shows both arms in a neutral position. Frame 2 shows the robot's right arm extending towards the button. Frame 3 shows the right arm pressing the button. Frame 4 shows the right arm retracting slightly. Frame 5 shows the right arm returning to the neutral position.

frames.beat: both arms hang at the sides, ready
right arm extends forward, reaching for the button
right arm presses the button with deliberate force
right arm pulls back slightly from the button
right arm returns to rest at the side
